film.title: Drumline: A New Beat
film.overview: A girl from New York attends a college in Atlanta to join their once-famous marching band.

dialogues.dialogue: ♪I was paralyzed by those pair of lies♪  ♪but those pair of eyes brought me right back, back, back♪  ♪to you I gave up my pride for you♪  ♪by my side I just want you however I can♪  You're right, I was still angry at you.
That's what I'm talking about!  Shoutout to A&T ladies and gentlemen.  Victorious.  Can alumni be proud right now?  Be proud.  You should be.  Hey, yo, A&T is back.
